---
title: "MTGA Draft Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    code-fold: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(targets)

targets::tar_load(c(
  wins_losses_csv,
  deck_color_counts_csv
))


wins_losses <- readr::read_csv(wins_losses_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)
deck_color_counts <- readr::read_csv(
  deck_color_counts_csv,
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

set_order <- wins_losses$set_code
if (length(set_order) == 0) {
  set_order <- unique(deck_color_counts$set_code)
}

wins_plot_data <- wins_losses |>
  mutate(
    set_code = factor(set_code, levels = set_order),
    win_rate = coalesce(win_rate, 0)
  )

deck_long <- deck_color_counts |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("deck_color_"),
    names_to = "deck_color",
    values_to = "n"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    deck_color = str_remove(deck_color, "^deck_color_"),
    set_code = factor(set_code, levels = set_order)
  )

generated_at <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")
```

Last updated: `r generated_at`

## Win Rate by Set

```{r}
if (nrow(wins_plot_data) == 0) {
  plot.new()
  text(0.5, 0.5, "No win/loss data available.")
} else {
  ggplot(wins_plot_data, aes(x = set_code, y = win_rate, fill = win_rate)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = paste0(wins, "-", losses)),
      vjust = -0.4,
      size = 3
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#c7e9c0", high = "#238b45") +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = label_percent(scale = 1),
      limits = c(0, max(wins_plot_data$win_rate, na.rm = TRUE) + 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Set",
      y = "Win Rate",
      fill = "Win Rate",
      subtitle = "Text labels show wins-losses"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
}
```

## Deck Color Composition by Set

```{r}
if (nrow(deck_long) == 0) {
  plot.new()
  text(0.5, 0.5, "No deck color count data available.")
} else {
  ggplot(deck_long, aes(x = set_code, y = n, fill = deck_color)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    labs(
      x = "Set",
      y = "Number of Decks",
      fill = "Deck Color"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
}
```
